result.label: cortex-brain-v3
result.what_changed: Re-rendered the 4-design cortex set through docs/david-design-patterns.md (the taste spec). Replaced card-grids + numbered rails with hand-authored SVG diagrams; killed the yellow #ffde59 / gold-on-brown scheme for a light-mode + green/blue/purple/teal semantic-block palette; removed the demoted Orient strip; added ghost text, thin neutral connectors (colour in blocks not lines), legend strips and INPUT/OUTPUT headers; eased prose to one short blurb per element. Data files reframed to v2.0.0 (trimmed prose, hue + diagram fields) with meta.source + commit_sha provenance kept. Gallery reskinned off-brown, hero 06 first, 01 + 05 kept.

failures_fixed.06-brain-anatomy: A (one labelled SVG: I/O header, 4 colour-coded lobes, recall=output, 3 swappable organs as pluggable sockets) + B (semantic palette, orange only as tiny swap-pin highlight) + C (ghost 'BRAIN', labels over paragraphs, no Orient strip)
failures_fixed.02-brain-remembers: A (two-lane remember→recall flow diagram with fan-out + blend node) + B (semantic blocks, neutral connectors) + C (ghost 'RECALL', one-line per node)
failures_fixed.03-four-memories: A (hub-and-spoke colour-coded diagram, not a flat card-grid) + B (one semantic hue per region) + C (ghost 'MEMORY', terse)
failures_fixed.04-brain-sleeps: A (circular ring cycle diagram decay→tag→merge→link→tier around a SLEEP hub) + B (semantic hues, neutral arc connectors) + C (ghost 'SLEEP', one-line per step)

result.verified: all 4 designs + gallery + 4 data JSON return HTTP 200 on :7422; JSON re-validated. Playwright screenshot skipped (browser in use by another session).
